description: Restrict /mcp and /mcp/* ingress to the Anthropic egress CIDR block. Non-Anthropic source IPs receive 403 at the Cloudflare edge before reaching the Hetzner origin.
apply_via: Cloudflare dashboard - Security - WAF - Custom rules
rule_expression: (http.request.uri.path eq "/mcp" or starts_with(http.request.uri.path, "/mcp/")) and not ip.src in {160.79.104.0/21}

fallback_flag.name: mcp.edge_allowlist_disabled
fallback_flag.effect: When true, the WAF rule is disabled in the dashboard so demo recording + manual staging tests reach the origin. Revert to false before submission per honest-claim discipline.

notes: Anthropic's public documentation lists 160.79.104.0/21 as the egress CIDR for Claude.ai custom connector fetches as of April 2026. Check the CIDR list before each submission: https://docs.anthropic.com/en/api/ip-addresses.
Cloudflare free tier allows one custom WAF rule. This rule consumes it; secondary rate limiting runs on the origin via src/backend/middleware/rate_limit.py.

Add a second rule only when a paid Cloudflare plan is active. Coordinate with Plutus before upgrading the Cloudflare plan (the cost hits the platform operating budget, not the Anthropic API credit pool).

For local Playwright + curl testing, temporarily set Hemera flag mcp.edge_allowlist_disabled=true or test via the Cloudflare development mode toggle. Both paths log the exception and must be reverted before the demo recording.
